info.name: GraphQL – Usage Module
info.description: Usage: usage, featureOverview; trackUsage, resetUsage. Variables: use camelCase (feature, input.feature, input.amount). See sql/apis/09_USAGE_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query { usage { usage { features { feature used limit remaining resetAt } } } }","variables":{}}
{"query":"query GetUsage($feature: String) { usage { usage(feature: $feature) { features { feature used limit remaining resetAt } } } }","variables":{"feature":"EMAIL_FINDER"}}

body: query":"query FeatureOverview($feature: String!) { featureOverview { featureOverview(feature: $feature) { feature usage { feature used limit } activities { id service_type } jobs { job_id job_type } } } }","variables":{"feature":"EMAIL_FINDER"}}
query":"mutation TrackUsage($input: TrackUsageInput!) { usage { trackUsage(input: $input) { feature used limit success } } }","variables":{"input":{"feature":"EMAIL_FINDER","amount":1}}
query":"mutation ResetUsage($input: ResetUsageInput!) { usage { resetUsage(input: $input) { feature used limit success } } }","variables":{"input":{"feature":"EMAIL_FINDER"}}
